'''âw-y-h''' ('''kawayah''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:vab|vab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-y-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:vab|vab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-y-h
|-
! Lemma
| kawayah
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwayah|thiwayah]] || [[word:jiwayah|jiwayah]] || [[word:shiwayah|shiwayah]] || [[word:kiwayah|kiwayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwayah|thuthuwayah]] || [[word:jujuwayah|jujuwayah]] || [[word:shushuwayah|shushuwayah]] || [[word:kukuwayah|kukuwayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwayah|thuwayah]] || [[word:juwayah|juwayah]] || [[word:shuwayah|shuwayah]] || [[word:kuwayah|kuwayah]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwayah|thuwayah]] || [[word:juwayah|juwayah]] || [[word:shuwayah|shuwayah]] || [[word:kuwayah|kuwayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewayah|thewayah]] || [[word:jewayah|jewayah]] || [[word:shewayah|shewayah]] || [[word:kewayah|kewayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowayah|thothowayah]] || [[word:jojowayah|jojowayah]] || [[word:shoshowayah|shoshowayah]] || [[word:kokowayah|kokowayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowayah|thowayah]] || [[word:jowayah|jowayah]] || [[word:showayah|showayah]] || [[word:kowayah|kowayah]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowayah|thowayah]] || [[word:jowayah|jowayah]] || [[word:showayah|showayah]] || [[word:kowayah|kowayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwayah|thĂŠwayah]] || [[word:jĂŠwayah|jĂŠwayah]] || [[word:shĂŠwayah|shĂŠwayah]] || [[word:kĂŠwayah|kĂŠwayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawayah|thathawayah]] || [[word:jajawayah|jajawayah]] || [[word:shashawayah|shashawayah]] || [[word:kakawayah|kakawayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawayah|thawayah]] || [[word:jawayah|jawayah]] || [[word:shawayah|shawayah]] || [[word:kawayah|kawayah]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawayah|thawayah]] || [[word:jawayah|jawayah]] || [[word:shawayah|shawayah]] || [[word:kawayah|kawayah]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawayah|shawayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawayah|goshawayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawayah|gokishawayah]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawayahnĂŒ|shawayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawayahnknĂŒ|goshawayahnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayahnĂŒ|gokishawayahnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawayahshĂ«|shawayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawayahnkshĂ«|goshawayahnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawayahshĂ«|gokishawayahshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayahro|shawayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayahnkro|goshawayahnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayahro|gokishawayahro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayahmu|shawayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayahnkmu|goshawayahnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayahmu|gokishawayahmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawayahsher|shawayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawayahnksher|goshawayahnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawayahsher|gokishawayahsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawayahng|shawayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawayahnkng|goshawayahnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawayahng|gokishawayahng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawayahya|shawayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawayahnkya|goshawayahnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawayahya|gokishawayahya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawayahyam|shawayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawayahnkyam|goshawayahnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawayahyam|gokishawayahyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayahnĂŒshĂ«|shawayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayahnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawayahnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayahnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawayahnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayahnĂŒro|shawayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayahnknĂŒro|goshawayahnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayahnĂŒro|gokishawayahnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayahnĂŒmu|shawayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayahnknĂŒmu|goshawayahnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayahnĂŒmu|gokishawayahnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayahshĂ«nĂŒ|shawayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawayahnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayahshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawayahshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayahshĂ«ro|shawayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayahnkshĂ«ro|goshawayahnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayahshĂ«ro|gokishawayahshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayahshĂ«mu|shawayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayahnkshĂ«mu|goshawayahnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayahshĂ«mu|gokishawayahshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayahronĂŒ|shawayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayahnkronĂŒ|goshawayahnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayahronĂŒ|gokishawayahronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayahroshĂ«|shawayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayahnkroshĂ«|goshawayahnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayahroshĂ«|gokishawayahroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawayahromu|shawayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawayahnkromu|goshawayahnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawayahromu|gokishawayahromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawayahmunĂŒ|shawayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawayahnkmunĂŒ|goshawayahnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawayahmunĂŒ|gokishawayahmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawayahmushĂ«|shawayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawayahnkmushĂ«|goshawayahnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawayahmushĂ«|gokishawayahmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawayahmuro|shawayahmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawayahnkmuro|goshawayahnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawayahmuro|gokishawayahmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
